Cut all veg to a thick julienne cut, about 4mm x 8 cm
Heat a large rondeau over high heat, until water beads on surface
Moving quickly and in batches by individual vegetable, add to pan for initial sear, then add oil to coat and prevent sticking
Shake the pan and stir with rubber spatula.
Season lightly with salt.
Once veg is sweated and has light char, reserve to parchment lined sheet trays and cool in blast chiller
After all veg is cooked and cooled, mix together in a large mixing bowl until relatively homogenous
Reserve to hotel pan after cooled.
Store in cooler
